#### Preserve ASI protection for breaking ternaries (#19649 by @tianrking)

<!-- prettier-ignore -->
```jsx
// Input
let result = 1;
(
    1 ||
    12345678901234567890123456789012345678901234567890123456789012345678901234567890
) ?
    2
:   3

// Prettier stable
let result = 1
(
    1 ||
    12345678901234567890123456789012345678901234567890123456789012345678901234567890
) ?
    2
:   3

// Prettier main
let result = 1
;(
    1 ||
    12345678901234567890123456789012345678901234567890123456789012345678901234567890
) ?
    2
:   3
```
